---
title: "Conflicting Flood-Risk Flags"
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    toc-depth: 3
    df-print: paged
    embed-resources: true
execute:
  echo: false
  warning: false
  message: false
params:
  township: "01"
  data_rds: "outputs/township_reports/data/sfha_conflict_sf.rds"
---

```{r}
library(sf)
library(dplyr)
library(stringr)
library(ggplot2)

twp <- params$township
sfha_conflict_sf <- readRDS(params$data_rds) |>
  mutate(township = str_sub(pin10, 1, 2)) |>
  filter(conflict_score > 0, township == twp)

n_parcels <- nrow(sfha_conflict_sf)
n_pins <- length(unique(sfha_conflict_sf$pin10))
```

## Township `r twp`

- Conflicting parcels (rows): **`r n_parcels`**
- Unique PINs: **`r n_pins`**

## Map

```{r fig.height=7, fig.width=7}
ggplot(sfha_conflict_sf) +
  geom_sf(aes(fill = factor(conflict_score)), linewidth = 0) +
  scale_fill_manual(
    values = c(
      "0" = "gray",
      "1" = "#fee08b",
      "2" = "#f46d43",
      "3" = "#d73027",
      "4" = "#7f0000"
    ),
    name = "Conflict score"
  ) +
  labs(
    title = paste0("Parcels with conflicting flood-risk classifications (Township ", twp, ")"),
    subtitle = "Counts disagreements across spatial methods and risk thresholds"
  ) +
  theme_void()
```

## Offending PINs (top of the pile)

```{r}
sfha_conflict_sf |>
  st_drop_geometry() |>
  count(pin10, conflict_score, sort = TRUE) |>
  arrange(desc(conflict_score), desc(n))
```

## Full parcel list for this township

```{r}
sfha_conflict_sf |>
  st_drop_geometry() |>
  select(pin10, conflict_score, everything()) |>
  arrange(desc(conflict_score))
```
